subject: English
title: Phonics Fun
tagline: Blend sounds together to decode and read words!

steps.label: c-a-t
steps.description: Blend the sounds /c/ /a/ /t/ together to read the word 'cat'.

steps.label: s-u-n
steps.description: Blend the sounds /s/ /u/ /n/ together to read the word 'sun'.

steps.label: d-o-g
steps.description: Blend the sounds /d/ /o/ /g/ together to read the word 'dog'.

steps.label: m-a-p
steps.description: Blend the sounds /m/ /a/ /p/ together to read the word 'map'.

steps.label: p-i-g
steps.description: Blend the sounds /p/ /i/ /g/ together to read the word 'pig'.

steps.label: b-e-d
steps.description: Blend the sounds /b/ /e/ /d/ together to read the word 'bed'.
